name: Can I sue my employer directly for hearing damage instead of comp?
description: No, use workers' comp unless intentional.[5]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer directly for hearing damage instead of comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, use workers' comp unless intentional.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Generally no, workers' comp is exclusive remedy barring gross negligence or intentional acts.** Third-party suits ok for faulty gear suppliers.[5] Utah/Idaho limit employer suits.[2][1] Exceptions rare like no protection despite known risks. Comp faster, no-fault.[3]
